office_does: A state senator writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: A long-serving incumbent advocating lower taxes, spending restraint, deregulation, and parental authority faces a school and community organizer emphasizing education and infrastructure investment with fiscal accountability.

candidates.summary: Fortunato is an incumbent senator and former representative campaigning on lower taxes, spending restraint, enforcement-oriented safety, deregulation, and parental authority.
highlights: Supports lower taxes and spending restraint [S3]
Supports public safety, parental authority in education, and reduced regulation for housing and business [S3]
Brings incumbent Senate and prior House experience [S2][S3]

housing.basis: He supports reducing regulation to expand housing activity.

safety.basis: Public safety is an explicit priority in his broader accountability-focused platform.

experience.basis: He is an incumbent senator and former state representative with a long legislative record.

social.basis: He explicitly supports parental authority in education.

candidates.summary: Stramel is a school and community organizer advocating education and rural-infrastructure investment alongside transparent government and fiscal accountability.
highlights: Supports education investment and rural infrastructure [S2]
Supports transparent government and fiscal accountability [S2]

spending.basis: She genuinely combines education and infrastructure investment with fiscal accountability.

experience.basis: She brings community, school, and political-organizing experience but no documented elected or legislative record.
